patchlogs.name: Veilbreaker: Revenant Prime: Hotfix 32.0.9
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Kahl’s Boltor Grattler doing inconsistent damage to the Wolf of Saturn Six when aiming under his feet in the Prison Break mission.

patchlogs.name: Khora Prime: Hotfix 31.7.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed ragdolled enemies flying towards your next shot when killed with physics-based projectiles (for example Boltor) DoT damage.

patchlogs.name: Nightwave: Prime Vault: Hotfix 30.6.1
patchlogs.changes:
Rhino Prime, Nyx Prime, Ankyros Prime, Boltor Prime, Hikou Prime, and Scindo Prime Relics have been added to the drop tables! These Relics have replaced the Zephyr and Chroma Prime Relics in the Void drop tables, Bounties, and Relic Packs.
Boltor Prime
Boltor Prime

patchlogs.name: Update 28: The Deadlock Protocol
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Boltor Bravura Skin being broken when equipped on the Telos Boltor.

patchlogs.name: Nightwave Series 3: Glassmaker: Hotfix 27.5.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Entropy Spike equipped on a Bolto causing self damage. This will now accurately cause self stagger.

patchlogs.name: Update 26: The Old Blood
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Boltor Bravura Skin being overly jittery.

patchlogs.name: The Sacrifice: Prime Vault Hotfix 23.1.2!
patchlogs.fixes:
Boltor Prime
Boltor Prime

patchlogs.name: Shrine of the Eidolon: Hotfix 22.17.1 - 22.17.1.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed unintended shell dropping sound on Telos Boltor

patchlogs.name: Shrine of the Eidolon: Update 22.16.0
patchlogs.changes:
Boltor Prime Status Chance increased from 32% to 34%.
Updated the Verismo Syandana and Boltor Bravura Skin material to appear more metallic (for improved reflections and highlighting) to better match the Octavia Maestra Skin.

patchlogs.name: Shrine of the Eidolon: Hotfix 22.14.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Boltor Bravura Skin spawning multiple clips during the reload animation.

patchlogs.name: Shrine of the Eidolon: Hotfix 22.14.1
patchlogs.changes: The Boltor Bravura Skin now has its own custom reload animation!
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed missing reload sounds for the Boltor Bravura Skin.

patchlogs.name: Warframe Update 22: Plains of Eidolon
patchlogs.changes: One of Warframe’s biggest appeals is the diverse selection of weaponry. Even within the subclasses of rifles and pistols, there is huge variety to be found, such as the distinction between projectile weapons (firing physical projectiles which move through space, like the Boltor) and hitscan weapons (firing draws an imaginary line between the gun and the point aimed at, doing damage instantly to whatever it hits, like the Soma). For obvious reasons, hitscans are very effective at long distances

patchlogs.name: Chains of Harrow: Update 21.3.0
patchlogs.changes: Optimized firing sound performance of the Boltor.

patchlogs.name: The Glast Gambit: Update 19.5
patchlogs.changes:
Boltor 60 to 30
Boltor Prime 60 to 36
Telos Boltor 90 to 42

patchlogs.name: Update 19: The War Within
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Boltor projectiles absorbing/preventing melee damage for a short time.
Fixed projectile weapons (i.e. Boltor) with Punch Through not going through allies.

patchlogs.name: The Silver Grove
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed crash when you destroy a Blunt with projectiles stuck to it. (eg shoot it with Boltor)

patchlogs.name: Specters of the Rail: U2.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed enemies not being alerted by the Bolto, AkBolto, and Telos AkBolto.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.6.2
patchlogs.fixes: Boltor Prime damage has been reduced in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.4.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed missing weapon trails from projectiles created by the Akbolto, Prime Boltor, Telos Boltor, Telos Akbolto, and Twin Gremlins.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.3.0
patchlogs.fixes: Arbiters of Hexis: Telos Boltor

patchlogs.name: Update 16.8.0
patchlogs.fixes: Ormolu Skins for your Daikyu, Akbolto, Bolto and Tipedo Weapons as well as the Ormolu Kyroptera Syandana will add an honorable brass and gold finish.

patchlogs.name: Update 16.5: Tubemen Of Regor
patchlogs.changes: The following weapons are now available for use in Conclave:  Dera, Dera Vandal, Boltor, Boltor Prime, Tonfa, Heat Sword, Dual Heat Swords, Glaive, Glaive Prime, Kestrel, Fragor, Wraith Karak.
patchlogs.fixes: BOLTACE: An intimidating Tonfa set designed to match the briary design of the Boltor.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 16.2.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Latron Prime Blueprint dropping from Reinforced Orokin Loot Crates instead of Boltor Prime Blueprint.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 15.13.1
patchlogs.fixes: * Fixed Boltor Prime’s material colors not displaying properly.

patchlogs.name: Warframe: Archwing
patchlogs.changes: Bolto: Entropy Spike: adds 0.1% projectile explosion chance

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 14.0.11
patchlogs.fixes: Reduced the damage multipliers across multiple weapons in an effort to provide a more balanced playing field across all weapons. Details of these weapons involved:Boltor damage multiplier reduced from 2.0 to .75

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 12.4.3
patchlogs.changes: Fixed Rifle Ammo Mutation mod not being compatible with Boltor Prime.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 12.4.1
patchlogs.changes: Disabled skins on Boltor Prime and Ankyros Prime.

patchlogs.name: Update 12.4.0
patchlogs.additions: ·         Grineer Shipyards tile set revealed with new “Hijack” game mode & Tethra’s Doom event!·         New Prime items in the Void!    Rhino Prime    Ankyros Prime    Boltor Prime    AkBronco Prime·         2x new Alternate helmets (Valkyr, Oberon)·         New Corpus Crewmen voices are here! They now have their own language and a whole new style as voted by the Design Council!

patchlogs.name: Update 12.3.0: The Grustrag Three
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Supra/Boltor not using energy colour.

patchlogs.name: Update 11.3.0
patchlogs.changes:
Buffed Boltor 
Buffed Bolto, Slightly more damage, more crit, projectile speed increase

patchlogs.name: Update 10.3.0: Hump Day!
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed animation bug with Boltor if reload is interrupted by melee.
Fixed Akimbo Bolto sound attenuation and missing reload sounds.

patchlogs.name: Update 9: Vor's Revenge
patchlogs.fixes: Refined the tint options on the Burston, Viper, Gram, Furis, Afuris, Dera, Furax, and Boltor.

patchlogs.name: Update 6.5 Hotfixes
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Bolto projectiles firing in the wrong direction when standing close to an object.
Bolto projectiles should now be less affected by lag and more reliable at hitting targets.

patchlogs.name: Update 6.3 Hotfixes
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue with Bolto projectiles velocity slowing to zero while in the air still.

patchlogs.name: Update 6: Hotfix 6.2
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Bolto & Javelin projectiles carrying enemies for unrealistic distances.
Boltor Model Updated: A new look for a new favourite weapon!

patchlogs.name: Update 6: Hotfixes
patchlogs.fixes:
Boltor tweaks: Faster fire rate, less damage
Changed Boltor stats

patchlogs.name: Update 6 - "New Stompin’ Grounds"
patchlogs.additions: New weapons: Dual Zoren, Akbolto, and Boltor!

patchlogs.name: Update 5.3 - "Blazing Embers"
patchlogs.additions: Weapon Blueprints for Afuris and Bolto.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Bolto and powers inflating player weapon accuracy.
